core_mechanism: critical-threshold percolation on a lattice, computing the scale-invariant asymptotic probability that a connected cluster in a critically-tuned random medium links to and encircles prescribed boundary regions
brief_reason: The abstract derives an asymptotic formula for the probability that a critical site-percolation cluster intersects a boundary arc and surrounds an interior point, i.e. a crossing/connectivity probability of a cluster tuned exactly to the percolation threshold.
